title: lycopodium brachystachys
intro: Lycopodium brachystachys, also known as club moss, is a small, evergreen plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Lycopodium brachystachys include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lycopodium brachystachys include tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used in homeopathic and traditional medicine.
